content:
08.12.22
Yesterday, I went to the gym, I did a little work from home, and then got tired around the afternoon. This tiredness seems to be a trend that continues. Little bit afternoon, I drove down to Boca Raton and went to therapy. All day I was thinking about drugs and alcohol. I raised these concerns to Kim. And, when I met up with Chris and Aaron for dinner, all I could think about was a martini. But I did not give in. We went to go see the film, Nosferatu with a live score, and as I sensed Aaron and Chris getting a bit tired and worn out from their drink and drug, I was happy I was sober.

08.16.22
Relapse begins before you take your first drink. I have already decided I plan on relapsing. I went to look at apartments the past two days; I found the apartment that I want, and may strive to get into that apartment with in the next few weeks. What better way to celebrate moving out in the mail on my own time to have a drink? I want to go out. I want to go out! I want to go out, be drunk, and pick someone up, and then bring them home. I know this isn’t the right way. Work is going well; I interviewed for a I U, the interview went decently. I should hear back from the hiring committee within the next few days. However, I don’t need that job at this point, so it would be nice to have more than one fully online job. Right now I am waiting on hearing back from the apartments I applied to, I’m waiting for them to check my income, I’m waiting for the background check to come through. I have created this image of sobriety that I intend on keeping
